# Software Manual — FR3

> Complete software ecosystem: Franka UI, FCI real-time API, MATLAB Toolbox, Desk API, and more.

## System Overview

The Franka software ecosystem bridges robot hardware, user interfaces, real-time control,
and research tools. See the [system overview diagram](https://franka.de/hubfs/System%20Overview_June2025-1.png?hsLang=en).

## Interfaces

### Franka UI (Desk)
Browser-based graphical interface for intuitive robot control with drag-and-drop Apps.
Ideal for quick setups, demos, and human-robot interaction studies.

### Franka Control Interface (FCI)
Low-level real-time API for advanced users — direct control of joint torques, positions,
and velocities at 1 kHz. Works with libfranka (C++), ROS/ROS 2, and MATLAB/Simulink.

### Franka Toolbox for MATLAB
MATLAB and Simulink tools for algorithm development and testing with real-time robot data.

### Desk API
RESTful API for programmatic access — open brakes, manage configurations, download logs.

### RIDE & RACE
- **RIDE**: Robot Integrated Development Environment for custom Apps
- **RACE**: C-library for connecting third-party hardware to the robot
